title: Ison Corridor ambush
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev=*[[Evacuation of Yavin]]''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' |conc= |next=*Eventually the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'' |image=[[File:IsonAmbush-RSII.jpg]] |name=Ison Corridor ambush |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=Between [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] (35:9) and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |place=[[Ison Trade Corridor/Legends|Ison Corridor]] |result=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] escapes to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] |side1=Alliance to Restore the Republic |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Red Leader/Legends|Red Leader]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] *[[Redemption captain|Captain of the ''Redemption'']] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1=*[[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] **[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Flight]]Although ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' refers to the group as Rogue Squadron, the time period of the Ison Corridor ambush would make it Rogue Flight. |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*At least 4 [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65B X-wing starfighters]] *[[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] {{C|Late battle}} *6 [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transports]] *1 [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] **''Redemption'' *Second convoy † |forces2=*31 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] *11 [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*All of the second convoy |casual2=*Many TIE fighters and TIE Interceptors |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|We're almost out of this mess. If we can just make it through this nebula, we're all clear.''"
"''I've got a bad feeling about this.|The ''Redemption''{{'s}} Captain and Luke Skywalker during the ambush|audio=RedemptionCaptain-RS2.flac|}} The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] launched the '''Ison Corridor ambush''' against [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Convoy/Legends|convoys]] in the [[Ison Trade Corridor/Legends|Ison Corridor]] en route to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] after the [[Evacuation of Yavin|fall]] of the [[Great Temple/Legends|Yavin 4 base]]. ==Prelude== After the [[Evacuation of Yavin|evacuation]] of [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Great Temple/Legends|base]] at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], two [[Convoy/Legends|convoys]] were directed to rendezvous in the [[Ison Trade Corridor/Legends|Ison Corridor]]. Upon arrival, however, one of the convoys was wiped out by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces hidden in a nearby [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]]. ==The battle== The other convoy, led by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']], and consisting of six [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transports]] escorted by the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron's]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Flight]], arrived to discover the area littered with ruined ship parts, with no sign of the second convoy. The frigate's [[Redemption captain|Captain]] realized they had to pass through the debris field before escaping to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Suddenly, squadrons of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] ambushed the convoy from three different directions. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader}} At the start of the battle, [[Red Leader/Legends|Red Leader]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] noticed an object within some space debris. Temporarily leaving the battle, he managed to find an [[Advanced Proton Torpedo/Legends|advanced proton torpedo]] tech upgrade before returning to defend the transports. Because of the agility of the arriving waves of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]], the Rebels needed a faster craft than their X-wings. At [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles']] suggestion, Skywalker docked with the frigate and took control of an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]]. Once the Interceptors had been destroyed, the convoy entered the nebula, which stood between them and escape, and were attacked by more TIE Fighters and Interceptors hidden in the cloud. The Rebel pilots managed to destroy all nearby TIE fighter squadrons, although they needed to use their targeting computers to do so, at Skywalker's order. Red Squadron was able to protect all the transports, leaving the nebula and successfully escorting the remaining convoy to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. {{Endgame}} ==Aftermath== The arrival of the Rebel supply convoy on Hoth supported the efforts of Alliance engineers to construct [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], which would later be the site of a key [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|battle]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Red Squadron leader [[Arhul Narra/Legends|Narra]] and the [[Battle of Derra IV|destruction]] of [[Renegade Flight]], Skywalker was promoted to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] and put in charge of the squadron. ==Behind the scenes== The ambush appeared in the video game ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]''. Picking up the upgrade in the mission will fulfill the bonus objective, and the player has the option of switching to the A-wing mid-mission. The convoy may take up to five casualties before failing the mission, but this article assumes 100% completion. The game's campaign was included in ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'', although the co-op version features nine transports to defend. This article follows the original portrayal. The objective to defend at least one transport remained.''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'' {{1st}} {{1stID|Ison Corridor ambush}} *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' {{C|In co-op}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' *{{GamerCite|9|State of the Arts}} {{Po}} *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the Ison Corridor ambush}} {{Reflist}} {{GCW Evacuation}} {{Interlang |de=Scharmützel im Ison-Korridor |fr=Piège dans le Corridor d'Ison |es=Batalla del Corredor de Ison }} [[Category:Battles in the Anoat sector]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]]
